changedFiles.reason: Generated active Work Item status.

Added a narrowly validated first-adoption companion-rule exemption while retaining scope ownership.

guidelinesCompliance.guideline: Bootstrap evidence must satisfy the same complete-PR ownership check it introduces.
guidelinesCompliance.evidence: The isolated adoption test finishes and passes check-ai-pr against the pre-adoption commit.

guidelinesCompliance.guideline: Do not bypass required governance gates by claiming project quality was configured during adoption.
guidelinesCompliance.evidence: Adoption records only governance hard gates and lists project quality as a residual follow-up.

guidelinesCompliance.guideline: All installer mutations must participate in one rollback transaction.
guidelinesCompliance.evidence: Existing paths are backed up, new paths tracked, and failure tests verify .gitignore and directory cleanup.

guidelinesCompliance.guideline: Archive claims must match PR policy enforcement and not imply filesystem immutability.
guidelinesCompliance.evidence: Runtime message and documentation use append-only PR policy wording with explicit filesystem limits.

guidelinesCompliance.guideline: Do not hand-edit generated cockpit status.
guidelinesCompliance.evidence: Status was generated by lifecycle commands.

risk.detail: Adoption ownership and rollback are covered by end-to-end and failure-path tests.

residualRisks.detail: Public v0.4.4 does not contain --create-adoption; a new tag and atomic release metadata update are still required.
Real minimal project CI for Python, Go, TypeScript, and Rust remains unimplemented.
Archive evidence is protected by PR policy, not filesystem permissions or external immutable storage.

reviewReadiness.reason: The bootstrap paradox, rollback leak, and archive wording are fixed in source; public release and multi-stack CI remain external follow-ups.

userCorrectionsCaptured: The first installation PR must be able to satisfy the complete PR ownership policy it introduces.

checkpointEvidence.detail: Adoption ownership, transaction rollback, archive semantics, and documentation scope reviewed.
Full tests, end-to-end adoption PR, rollback failures, documentation accuracy, and residual release risks reviewed.

knownGaps: A new public release has not been published.
Real multi-stack project CI has not been added.
overclaimPrevention: Claims distinguish source-tree adoption capability, public release availability, and PR-policy archive enforcement.
